title: pterocarpus rotundifolius subsp. rotundifolius
intro: Pterocarpus rotundifolius subsp. rotundifolius, commonly known as the Mundane, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pterocarpus rotundifolius subsp. rotundifolius include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
